## Meeting Purpose

[Discuss Surge AI's operational process and technology platform to create compelling messaging for customers and prospects.](https://fathom.video/share/GZv13ugusFx3eduup5HwLBXcJijZ24gy?tab=summary&timestamp=30.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Surge AI's competitive edge stems from three core pillars: proprietary technology platform, expert internal team, and curated workforce of "Surgers"](https://fathom.video/share/GZv13ugusFx3eduup5HwLBXcJijZ24gy?tab=summary&timestamp=364.0)
  - [Platform enables rapid UI creation, workforce management, and quality control through multiple data signals and review processes](https://fathom.video/share/GZv13ugusFx3eduup5HwLBXcJijZ24gy?tab=summary&timestamp=315.0)
  - [Balancing transparency about processes with focus on end results is key challenge in customer communication](https://fathom.video/share/GZv13ugusFx3eduup5HwLBXcJijZ24gy?tab=summary&timestamp=1374.0)

## Topics

### Surge AI's End-to-End Process

  - [Customer submits data request (e.g., finance experts writing LLM prompts for SEC filings)](https://fathom.video/share/GZv13ugusFx3eduup5HwLBXcJijZ24gy?tab=summary&timestamp=252.0)
  - [Internal team creates tailored instructions and UI using Surge platform (typically within 1 day)](https://fathom.video/share/GZv13ugusFx3eduup5HwLBXcJijZ24gy?tab=summary&timestamp=245.0)
  - [Project launched to filtered subset of Surge workforce](https://fathom.video/share/GZv13ugusFx3eduup5HwLBXcJijZ24gy?tab=summary&timestamp=740.0)
  - [Multiple quality control measures applied (e.g., LLM helpers, review scores, time analytics)](https://fathom.video/share/GZv13ugusFx3eduup5HwLBXcJijZ24gy?tab=summary&timestamp=664.0)
  - [Data reviewed internally and by selected Surgers before delivery to customer](https://fathom.video/share/GZv13ugusFx3eduup5HwLBXcJijZ24gy?tab=summary&timestamp=1286.0)

### Technology Platform Advantages

  - [Rapid UI creation (hours vs. weeks for some competitors)](https://fathom.video/share/GZv13ugusFx3eduup5HwLBXcJijZ24gy?tab=summary&timestamp=572.0)
  - [Native LLM integration for real-time task validation](https://fathom.video/share/GZv13ugusFx3eduup5HwLBXcJijZ24gy?tab=summary&timestamp=666.0)
  - [Sophisticated workforce filtering and management tools](https://fathom.video/share/GZv13ugusFx3eduup5HwLBXcJijZ24gy?tab=summary&timestamp=747.0)
  - [Extensive quality signals and analytics (e.g., Surger profiles, review scores, time spent)](https://fathom.video/share/GZv13ugusFx3eduup5HwLBXcJijZ24gy?tab=summary&timestamp=649.0)
  - [Ability to "impersonate" Surgers to understand their experience](https://fathom.video/share/GZv13ugusFx3eduup5HwLBXcJijZ24gy?tab=summary&timestamp=1127.0)

### Quality Control Measures

  - [Multiple data signals used to evaluate Surger performance:](https://fathom.video/share/GZv13ugusFx3eduup5HwLBXcJijZ24gy?tab=summary&timestamp=639.0)
      - [Time spent on tasks](https://fathom.video/share/GZv13ugusFx3eduup5HwLBXcJijZ24gy?tab=summary&timestamp=943.0)
      - [Peer review scores](https://fathom.video/share/GZv13ugusFx3eduup5HwLBXcJijZ24gy?tab=summary&timestamp=1239.0)
      - [Performance on "honeypot" tasks with known answers](https://fathom.video/share/GZv13ugusFx3eduup5HwLBXcJijZ24gy?tab=summary&timestamp=1108.0)
      - [Historical rejection rates](https://fathom.video/share/GZv13ugusFx3eduup5HwLBXcJijZ24gy?tab=summary&timestamp=1267.0)
      - [Review behavior when evaluating others' work](https://fathom.video/share/GZv13ugusFx3eduup5HwLBXcJijZ24gy?tab=summary&timestamp=1077.0)
  - [Session playback for detailed work analysis](https://fathom.video/share/GZv13ugusFx3eduup5HwLBXcJijZ24gy?tab=summary&timestamp=1152.0)
  - [AI usage detection to ensure human-generated content](https://fathom.video/share/GZv13ugusFx3eduup5HwLBXcJijZ24gy?tab=summary&timestamp=1162.0)
  - [Internal review process before customer delivery](https://fathom.video/share/GZv13ugusFx3eduup5HwLBXcJijZ24gy?tab=summary&timestamp=1190.0)

### Workforce Management

  - [Curated teams of experts across various domains](https://fathom.video/share/GZv13ugusFx3eduup5HwLBXcJijZ24gy?tab=summary&timestamp=747.0)
  - [Detailed Surger profiles with performance metrics and work history](https://fathom.video/share/GZv13ugusFx3eduup5HwLBXcJijZ24gy?tab=summary&timestamp=980.0)
  - [Ability to quickly assemble specialized teams (e.g., "coders in the UK with 5+ years experience")](https://fathom.video/share/GZv13ugusFx3eduup5HwLBXcJijZ24gy?tab=summary&timestamp=799.0)

### Customer Interface

  - [Access to high-level project analytics](https://fathom.video/share/GZv13ugusFx3eduup5HwLBXcJijZ24gy?tab=summary&timestamp=1296.0)
  - [Raw data delivery via CSV, JSON, or API](https://fathom.video/share/GZv13ugusFx3eduup5HwLBXcJijZ24gy?tab=summary&timestamp=1302.0)
  - [Limited visibility into internal quality control processes](https://fathom.video/share/GZv13ugusFx3eduup5HwLBXcJijZ24gy?tab=summary&timestamp=1374.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Develop messaging that highlights the synergy between Surge AI's technology, internal expertise, and curated workforce](https://fathom.video/share/GZv13ugusFx3eduup5HwLBXcJijZ24gy?tab=summary&timestamp=1464.0)
  - [Find balance in communicating process details without overwhelming customers or inviting micromanagement](https://fathom.video/share/GZv13ugusFx3eduup5HwLBXcJijZ24gy?tab=summary&timestamp=1374.0)
  - [Emphasize the combination of technological capabilities and human expertise as a key differentiator](https://fathom.video/share/GZv13ugusFx3eduup5HwLBXcJijZ24gy?tab=summary&timestamp=1536.0)
